holdings.infoBox: JHMD is an equity ETF with a total of 595 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.15%, Vinci at 1.70%, Jh Collateral at 1.60%, Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria at 1.06%, and HSBC Holdings at 1.02%.

overview.description: The John Hancock Multifactor Developed International ETF (JHMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of stocks from developed markets ex-US and Canada, covering 85% of the market capitalization. Holdings are weighted based on fundamental and technical factors JHMD was launched on Dec 15, 2016 and is issued by John Hancock.
infoTable: John Hancock Dimensional Developed International Index
